title: Dell security advisory (AV26-181)
description: Between February 23 and March 1, 2026, Dell published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products:
products: Dell PowerStore T Security  versions prior to 4.3.1.0-2662695
Dell AMD-based PowerEdge Server  multiple versions and models
Dell PowerEdge  multiple versions and models
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
